expectations.text: References only real endpoints from the skill's catalog
expectations.evidence: Endpoints use '/api/fermentations/:fermentationId' (missing the '/v1/' version prefix) and the alert endpoint is '/api/fermentations/:id/alerts?status=active' rather than the catalog's '/api/v1/executions/{execution_id}/alerts'
No Authorization header or Bearer token is mentioned anywhere in the response; authentication requirements are entirely absent

expectations.text: Notes that winery_id is automatic via JWT (not passed manually)
expectations.evidence: winery_id is not mentioned at all in the response, and there is no discussion of JWT-derived identity or automatic tenant resolution

expectations.text: Suggests polling interval for live fermentation data
expectations.evidence: Add a polling interval (e.g., 60s) on samples and alerts for near-real-time monitoring
No acknowledge or dismiss actions are described; the response only covers fetching alerts via GET and filtering by status=active, with no mention of POST actions to change alert state
